section.heading: Advertising of downpayments and installments
section.chapeau: No advertisement to aid, promote, or assist directly or indirectly any extension of consumer credit may state

paragraph.content: that a specific periodic consumer credit amount or installment amount can be arranged, unless the creditor usually and customarily arranges credit payments or installments for that period and in that amount.
that a specified downpayment is required in connection with any extension of consumer credit, unless the creditor usually and customarily arranges downpayments in that amount.
